meta.notes: Captured against live production CDN (not a local build). Headless browsers only — real Safari.app not tested.

blog_sidebar.note: CLS is zero in headless chromium — the reported 'blinking' symptom does not reproduce here. Either Safari-specific, paint-level flicker (not CLS), or needs different viewport/scenario.

mobile_safari_iphone_14.note: Dramatically faster than desktop chromium (16x on menu, 14x on search first-results). Suggests the jank is desktop-specific — mobile users aren't affected.

blog_post_load.note: Same numbers as chromium for initial load. Headless WebKit did not reproduce the Safari-reported blinking anchors — Phase 3 will use Playwright MCP (interactive mode) and real Safari.app video capture to see the actual symptom.

budgets_set.description: Starter budgets = current production + safety margin. Ratchet down as fixes land.

targets_post_fix.description: Aspirational — what the numbers should look like after the punch-list fixes land. Phase 5 will ratchet budgets toward these.
